success_criteria: run-validator-b no longer passes the full prompt as a CLI argv value.
run-validator-b rejects sandbox modes other than read-only and enables Gemini CLI sandboxing with the boolean --sandbox flag.
run-validator-b applies a total embedded context byte budget and marks omitted files.
run-validator-b rejects Validator-A/Codex references in refs and changed_files.
run-validator-b prompt includes the validator-result schema content.
validate-handoffs discovers Validator-B fixtures without a single task-specific hardcode.
known_risks: Gemini CLI live smoke still depends on local installation and authentication.
forbidden_context: Do not include another validator result artifact.
Do not include secrets, credentials, API keys, tokens, or PII.
Do not ask Validator-B to modify files or merge branches.
